text.title: Agent Customer-Zero Pilot Protocol Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-customer-zero-pilot-protocol is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Pilot extends to 26 weeks with no GA decision; customer churns.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r1 + r5: hard 12-week box, explicit week-4 traffic light.

antipattern.description: Customer surprised by $4k bill at end of 'free pilot'.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r4: written billing decision before launch.

antipattern.description: Kill switch fails at week 11 when needed; agent runs amok.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r3: day-0 test, scheduled retest at week 4.
